hero.title: Mechatronics Engineering Student
hero.subtitle: Electronics & Embedded Systems
hero.role: VP & Electronics Lead at Ignitia Rocket Lab · Tec de Monterrey
hero.description: Mechatronics Engineering student at Tecnológico de Monterrey focused on electronics, embedded systems, and PCB design. Leading the avionics division of Ignitia Rocket Lab for LASC 2026.

about.title: About
about.bio: I am a Mechatronics Engineering student at Tecnológico de Monterrey with a strong focus on electronics, embedded systems, and PCB design. My experience in robotics, rocketry, and leadership roles has helped me develop analytical thinking, teamwork, and innovation skills. I aim to contribute to multidisciplinary projects that merge technology, automation, and design.

items.name: FC-2026 Flight Computer
items.desc: Custom SRAD flight computer for LASC 2026 Rocket Challenge. ESP32-S3, LoRa telemetry, GPS, pyro recovery.

items.name: LASC 2026 Satellite Challenge
items.desc: CanSat / PocketQube / CubeSat design for LASC 2026. No propulsion, budget ≤ $1,000 USD.

items.name: Ignitia Rocket Lab
items.desc: Tec de Monterrey student rocketry team. Competing at LASC 2026 Rocket Challenge and Satellite Challenge.

items.name: FIRST Robotics — Team Daedalus
items.desc: 3-year journey from technician to Mechanical Lead. Won Regional Hermosillo 2024, qualified World Championship.

items.name: Water Growth Solutions
items.desc: Smart irrigation system for rural communities. Arduino, React web interface, real-time monitoring.

items.name: TECHO México
items.desc: Emergency housing construction for vulnerable communities in Jalisco. Volunteer → Crew Co-Leader → Crew Leader.

items.title: ENMICE 2025
items.desc: 2nd place project presentation (WIRIKUTA 1.1) + Honorific conduct award

items.title: Spaceport America Cup 2023
items.desc: First Mexican team to complete full mission profile · Rank 79

items.title: Honorific Mention
items.desc: Bicultural High School · GPA 96/100 · Tec de Monterrey · May 2025

overview.title: Project Overview
overview.what: Custom SRAD flight computer for the LASC 2026 Rocket Challenge targeting 1 km apogee with solid propulsion.
overview.role: Project lead (electronics) — full schematic design and PCB layout in Altium Designer.
overview.manufacturer: JLCPCB or PCBWay — team solders components
overview.reflow: LPKF ZelFlow R04 · SAC305 lead-free solder

status.title: Development Status
items: LASC 2026 — September 2026 · Iacanga, São Paulo, Brazil

satellite.wip: Design and development in progress. This page will be updated as the project evolves.

frc.achievement: FIRST World Championship Houston 2024 — Qualified by winning Regional Hermosillo

techo.description: Participated in the construction of emergency housing for families in vulnerable communities. Strengthened teamwork, communication, and leadership skills while collaborating with local communities across Jalisco.

overview.title: Overview
overview.desc: Selected as a volunteer for the FIFA World Cup 2026™, one of the largest sporting events in the world. Matches in Mexico will be hosted at Estadio Akron in Guadalajara — contributing directly to the operational success of the tournament as part of the local volunteer program.

items.title: Venue Operations
items.desc: Supporting match-day operations at Estadio Akron, including crowd management, wayfinding, and spectator assistance.

items.title: Visitor Services
items.desc: Assisting international visitors with navigation, translation, and general information at the venue and surrounding areas.

items.title: Team Coordination
items.desc: Working within a structured volunteer team under FIFA and local organizing committee guidelines.

items.title: Cultural Ambassador
items.desc: Representing Guadalajara and Mexico to an international audience — promoting local culture and hospitality.

fifawc.status: Volunteer selection confirmed · Awaiting training program · FIFA World Cup 2026
